hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Hospedaria Lunar in Palmeiras offers family rooms with private bathrooms. Each room includes a balcony, kitchen, and dining area. Free on-site private parking is available.
Modern Amenities: Guests can enjoy streaming services, a washing machine, and a minibar. The terrace provides a relaxing outdoor space.
Breakfast and Parking: An American breakfast is served daily. The property is pet-friendly and welcomes guests with pets.
